MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS PETER KOEHLER, NELUM GUNEWARDANE, INTER-CONTINENTAL HOTELS CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Ismail Ramsey and Amy E. Craig of Ramsey Ehrlich LLP (510.548.3600) for plaintiff and responding party; Beau Richard Burbidge of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (438.6693) for defendants and moving parties.
Argued and the court modified its ruling as follows: Granted as to individuals without leave to amend. Granted with 10 days leave to amend as to the hotel itself. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
